title: Zstd:chunked podman-side tests
body:
This adds Podman tests of chunked pulls.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
@containers/podman-maintainers PTAL, this is the last part of the tracked Zstd blocker work.
@Luap99 WDYT about the current version? I think I have touched on most of the review comments — although I might not have resolved them satisfactorily.
